item.title: livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 9min "𝙄𝙩 𝙝𝙪𝙧𝙩 𝙬𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙨𝙤𝙢𝙚𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙞𝙙 𝙄 𝙬𝙖𝙨 𝙛𝙖𝙫𝙤𝙪𝙧𝙞𝙩𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙞𝙨𝙝 𝙗𝙤𝙩𝙩𝙤𝙢. 𝙄𝙩 𝙖𝙣𝙣𝙤𝙮𝙚𝙙 𝙢𝙚 𝙖 𝙗𝙞𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙗𝙚 𝙝𝙤𝙣𝙚
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 9min "𝙄𝙩 𝙝𝙪𝙧𝙩 𝙬𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙨𝙤𝙢𝙚𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙞𝙙 𝙄 𝙬𝙖𝙨 𝙛𝙖𝙫𝙤𝙪𝙧𝙞𝙩𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙞𝙨𝙝 𝙗𝙤𝙩𝙩𝙤𝙢. 𝙄𝙩 𝙖𝙣𝙣𝙤𝙮𝙚𝙙 𝙢𝙚 𝙖 𝙗𝙞𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙗𝙚 𝙝𝙤𝙣𝙚𝙨𝙩."
Recap & reaction as Clayton defies the odds again in Rotterdam De live-darts.com 153

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h Good evening. @philhaigh_ and I are in Sheffield for one of sport's great events.
T
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h Good evening. @philhaigh_ and I are in Sheffield for one of sport's great events.
Thank you to our various guests - @RoddyBisset , @_ShaneMacD and @robwalkertv - as we look ahead to the World Championship.
Reflections too on the John Virgo Memorial. open.spotify.com Talking Snooker Episode 249 - LIVE FROM SHEFFIELD: World Championship 2026 Preview Talking Snooker · Episode 2 6 257
